object_a.label: wall feature
object_a.long_form_open_description: Standard white rectangular rocker light switch mounted on the left wall at typical switch height near the bottom of the steps; plate contrasts with the beige wall.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: on the left wall near the base of the stairs and above the baseboard

object_b.label: chair
object_b.long_form_open_description: Oversized single-seat dark brown leather recliner with visible padded seams and reclining mechanism. Positioned on the left third of image, oriented slightly toward the center. Leather shows slight sheen and creasing consistent with use.
object_b.location_relative_to_other_objects: to the left of the left window and adjacent to a small wooden end table
object_b.object_text_long: left sector | Oversized single-seat dark brown leather recliner with visible padded seams and reclining mechanism. Positioned on the left third of image, oriented slightly toward the center. Leather shows slight sheen and creasing consistent with use.
